Details: A number of full-scale [2442, 2443, 2445, 2446, 2452, 2453] and bench-scale [2444, 2447, 2450, 2451] studies, both with and without ozone pre-treatment, observed a wide range of natural organic matter removal. The maximum removals reported for the biofiltration step alone were 77 percent for TOC, 65 percent for DOC, 84 percent for AOC and BDOC, and 54 percent for nonbiodegradable DOC. Factors that affected removal included EBCT and media age.
